than 1. For 2013–2015, 
there are fields for five CMR dates, see variables (CMR_RECEIVED_DT1–CMR_RECEIVED_DT5). Note 
that for 2016–2018 there are only two CMR_RECEIVED_DT fields — one for the initial CMR (the field 
called CMR_RECEIVED_DT1) and one for the final date (this field). Beginning in 2019, only the initial 
CMR date (CMR_RECEIVED_DT1) exists in the file.
